title: Flappyy Spindots
description: Welcome to Flappy Spindots! Test your reflexes and agility in this mind-bending game. Navigate your ball through a tricky elliptical path, dodging a barrage of weird shapes along the way. Saving these shapes from your ball increases your score, but beware – confusion is your enemy! The faster you score early on, the more challenging the game becomes. Can you stay focused and rack up a high score? Good luck!
instructions: Click to move away from center and at the same time avoid the enemy objects square-shaped
